'''Tyl''', called '''Tyl the Deplorable''', was a legendary [[Trunsk]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who united the Trunsks by conquering all of [[Trunska]]. He quickly converted his triumphant armies into a police force and diverted resources that formerly had gone toward war into technological development. As a result, the Trunsks quickly went from an isolated civilization with information-era technology to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] members with [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped starships (though it is not certain how much time passed between Tyl's conquests and Trunska's membership in the Republic).

{{Char-stub}}
